name: Camila Costa
bio: Camila works with NGOs and foundations on narrative and campaign strategy. She started the collective to create a space where communicators could learn from each other without the usual posturing.

name: Anna Vandenberghe
bio: Anna is a writer and editor focused on EU policy and advocacy. She believes good communication starts with clarity and honesty—and that both are skills we can practise.

name: Sophie Laurent
bio: Sophie runs events and partnerships for the collective. She has a background in public affairs and now helps organisations tell their stories in ways that resonate.
